title: The election: less analysis and more popcorn please
section_path: The election: less analysis and more popcorn please
section_path_text: The election: less analysis and more popcorn please
summary:
Main
Three things investors should know
The US is facing a tight election. Our analysis suggests that who is elected president, or which party controls the House does not have a significant bearing on asset returns. Even with foreknowledge of the future, it would be difficult to successfully trade on the event, as consequences may be random.
